name: 1.25bu Laundry Basket White - Brightroom™: Plastic Clothes Hamper with Built-In Handles, Medium Size, Portable Storage
description: The Brightroom Square Laundry Basket offers a classic solution that occupies less floor space and satisfies common laundry needs. The basket includes a gripping surface that adds comfort and ease when carrying your loads of clothes to and from the laundry room. The smooth plastic interior is snag proof and easy to clean. The large hole pattern provides maximum ventilation for clothes and helps eliminate excessive odors. Its durable design will hold up to your regular day-to-day use. This Laundry Basket is ideal for transporting laundry between rooms, collecting dirty laundry or sorting loads. The overall assembled dimensions of this item are 17 5/8" L x 17 5/8" W x 10 7/8" H.
